title: Tech & Beyond
description: This modpack combines advanced technology mods like Mekanism and Create with exploration enhancements such as Blue Skies and Distant Horizons, all optimized for performance with Embellium and Oculus.
body:
Embark on an adventure where cutting-edge technology meets boundless exploration. In this modpack you'll experience the perfect fusion of engineering prowess and immersive discovery:​

Technological Marvels: Harness the power of Mekanism and Create to construct intricate machinery, automate complex processes, and bring your engineering visions to life.​

Enhanced Performance: With Embellium and Oculus, enjoy optimized gameplay performance, ensuring smooth operation even with advanced mods and high-quality graphics settings.​

Expansive Horizons: Utilize Distant Horizons to extend your view distance, revealing breathtaking landscapes and distant terrains that beckon for exploration.​

New Worlds Await: Step into the realms introduced by Blue Skies, discovering mystical dimensions filled with unique biomes, formidable dungeons, and novel challenges.​
